# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: iam-service-account
    properties:
      project: <PROJECT_ID>
      location: <LOCATION>
      serviceAccountId: ${deployment.name}-sa
      description: Service account for application services authentication
    as: service_account

  - type: gcp-types/iam-v1:projects.locations.serviceAccounts.keys
    properties:
      keyAlgorithm: "ROLES_IAM ADMIN"
      keyType: "ASYNCHRONOUS"
    dependsOn:
      - resource
      name: ${service_account.name}
    as: service_account_key

outputs:
  json_key_file: "${service_account_key.privateKeyData}"
